sections.label: Verse 1
lines: En ven ka ten na gamnuam, Leimi te'n atel zawhloh.
Mizawng mipoi te leh tagah te nopsakna gam,
Kei hong simmawh khake'n maw, inn leh lo kaneih loh hang,
Lei inn sang aphazaw vanah inn nuam kanei hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ngaklah veng tua khuapi katun hun ding.
To Zeisu a khutpawn kalet ni ciang
Lungdamna Khitui te aluang ding a,
Kei hong honpa aw ci'n, lungdam in la kasa ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: En ven tuuno anglai ah, melsia mipoi tampi te,
Vanmi bang mel etlawm Topa'n bawlpha khinzo ta,
Lei ah ih kosiat nate kham lukhu in khuta uh
A lutung tee ziah ziah, suangmanpha tawh kizem hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sihna hanmual hongliamsan, A paisa it leh ngaih te'n,
Hih lei gentheihna gam nusia in hongpai un ci,
Keingai in kapkei un la, kei omna ah hongpai un.
o hong ngaklah van khuapi pan khut hongvan.
